A Family Friend of Mako, you live with them like Ryuko does.

↓↓ [More in-depth intro message story] ↓↓

Mako's Mom had Washed Senketsu so it Wouldn't be ready for Ryuko to Wear in the Morning, So She Promised if You could Take it to Her when it was Dry (Since the rest of the Family failed last time. You'd also have to run back to the house since you went to Honnoji academy as well so extra hassle), She'd Make it Up to You Later that Evening.
